description_long: This is a rectangular cigarette pack labeled 'Manchester United Kingdom EXTRA' with a predominantly white background and black and red text. The front and back display the brand name 'Manchester' in large, bold letters, with a red HQ emblem and the phrase 'House of Quality' above. The lower portion of the pack includes additional product information and a description of the tobacco blend. The sides of the pack feature vertical branding, a barcode, and a health warning, as well as a red diagonal stripe that wraps around the box. The top of the pack is flat and features the brand name and a circular stamp indicating '20 FILTER CIGARETTES'. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage, burn marks, or signs of use.
description: A white, rectangular 'Manchester' cigarette pack with bold black and red branding, detailed product information, and a red diagonal stripe on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Manchester United Kingdom EXTRA' branding, HQ emblem, and product description.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the vertical 'Manchester' text, barcode, and a red diagonal stripe.
description_view_2: Back view with the 'Manchester' branding, HQ emblem, and a detailed tobacco blend description.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a health warning, 'FOR ADULTS ONLY' text, and the red diagonal stripe.
attribute_brand_logo: The pack features a red HQ emblem with the text 'House of Quality' above the brand name 'Manchester'.
